notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran walks. Brandon Nimmo to 3rd. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reaches on a fielder's choice. Nathan Lukes to 2nd. Nathan Lukes advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Josh Jung.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran flies out to center fielder Daulton Varsho.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Corey Seager to pitcher Joe Ross. Sean Keys to 3rd. Ernie Clement out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Corey Seager to pitcher Joe Ross. Sean Keys to 3rd. Ernie Clement out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw grounds out, pitcher Tyler Alexander to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.detail: Luis Urías lines out to center fielder Alejandro Osuna.
